description: Style NoteUniquely designed and crafted from silver, this stunning bangle from lucera will definitely add a sparkle to your life. Diamond encrusted and in an attractive shape this piece is great as a gift, for a loved one or simply to enjoy yourself. Its elegant and minimalistic design complements the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today.Product DetailsSilver bangle with diamondsRound shaped, with hinged claspMaterials and CareSilver with CZ diamondsWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust
